name: node-npm-run-path
title: node-npm-run-path
summary: Get your PATH prepended with locally installed binaries
description:
Get your PATH prepended with locally installed binaries
In npm run scripts you can execute locally installed binaries by name.
This enables the same outside npm, by prepending locally installed
directory to PATH variable.
.
This package includes small packages:
- path-key: Get the PATH environment variable key using
cross-platform neutral way.
- unicorn-magic: various utilities needed by npm-run-path
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-npm-run-path because Get your PATH prepended with locally installed binaries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-npm-run-path as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-npm-run-path with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-npm-run-path --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
